📝 Tech Blog

Hi, Changsheng here! I am currently a 1st-Year Ph.D. student in School of Computing, National University of Singapore.

My research interests lie in exploring the trustworthiness of deep learning systems, graph neural networks and data mining on social networks and spatial-temporal data.

I obtained my Master's degree in School of Computing, National University of Singapore in 2021. Before that, I got my B.Eng. degree in the School of Computer Science and Technology, Xidian University in 2019.


PUBLICATIONS

See More at -> [Google Scholar] [dblp: Changsheng Sun]

  1. (ICSE'21) Self-Checking Deep Neural Networks in Deployment. Yan Xiao, Ivan Beschastnikh, David S. Rosenblum,Changsheng Sun, Sebastian Elbaum, Yun Lin, Jin Song Dong. [Video] [Code]
  2. (NeurIPS'20) Digraph Inception Convolutional Networks. Zekun Tong, Yuxuan Liang, Changsheng Sun, Xinke Li, David S. Rosenblum, Andrew Lim. [Poster] [Code]

EDUCATION

RESEARCH EXPERIENCES

  • (2021) Research Assistant @ TrustDNN, NUS School of Computing, NUS, Singapore.
  • (2020) Research Intern @ NUS-Singtel Cyber Security R&D Lab, Singapore.
  • (2018 - 2019) Undergrad Research Assistant @ Data Engineering and Security Lab, Xidian Univ., China.
  • (2018) Research Intern & Algorithm Engineer @ JD Intelligent Cities Research, China.
